cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently praise the company for its flexible hours and positive work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff highlight competitive pay, robust benefit packages, and generous time-off policies.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel overlooked for promotions and report limited opportunities for professional development.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reviews describe instances of toxic management, bullying, and fear of retaliation in certain departments.
